The PLM Model
The Product Launch Manager Model – an overview…
¨ There are more positions open then there are qualified launch managers
¨ Client selection is number one
¨ Number two is establishing and maintaining your authority
¨ Your number one job is generally going to be pushing your client
o 	You're going to be pushing them to make a great offer
o 	And they're going to push back, because they're not going to want to do all
the extra work that you're going to ask them to do, but this is going to be one
of the biggest things you do is coach them and consult with them, and cajole
them, and tease them, and beat them into creating an absolutely irresistible
offer. That's your job
o 	And then, you have to hold their feet to the fire, so they not only agree to do
it, but they actually create it
¨ The number one job here is pushing people -- push them
There's three primary roles you're going to have
¨ One of them is just the PURE LOGISTICS of how it’s actually going to
work…
o 	What shopping cart to use?
o 	What email host?
o 	If there's a team, how you're going to manage the team?
o 	What project management software you’ll use?
o 	How you're going to communicate with each other?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 4 --

ProductLaunchFormula.com 	© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
BONUS – Launch Partnership
o 	How you're going to shoot videos?
o 	Who's going shoot them?
o 	Where the videos will be hosted?
o 	How the page is going to get built?
o 	What merchant account?
o 	How to handle customer service?
o 	What help desk software or plugin ?
o 	Lots of details, and you can do them super complex, you can do them super
simple
o 	… as a Product Launch Manager, you might or might not have
responsibility for all that. This is all part of the negotiations
¨ Another role is the MANAGING THE ACTUAL LAUNCH STRATEGY
o 	What's our overall theme for the launch?
o 	What's the hook for the launch?
o 	What's the offer?
o 	What's the offer going to be called
o 	What are the bonuses going to be?
o 	What is the Prelaunch content look like?
o 	What's the overall story arc?
o 	What's that first PLC one going to be?
o 	What's PLC two going to be?
o 	What's PLC three going to be?
o 	How they're going to tie together?
o 	What’s in the sales video?
o 	What’s in the sales letter?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 4 --

ProductLaunchFormula.com 	© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
BONUS – Launch Partnership
o 	Is there a sales video or a sales letter, or both?
o 	What goes in the sales message?
o 	What's the open?
o 	What's the hook?
o 	What's the headline?
o 	What's the pricing?
o 	How do you reveal price?
o 	What do you put in case studies?
o 	Is there a webinar as part of this?
o 	Is there a live stream as part of this?
o 	Where does the scarcity come in?
o 	What's the open cart plan?
o 	How many days do you leave the cart open?
o 	What do you mail on day two, three, and four of open cart?
o 	All the strategy - the marketing strategy… that's a really big piece,
that's a huge high-value piece
¨ The third one is JV's, and the JV STRATEGY…
o 	Not every launch is a JV launch
o 	The recruitment - the attraction, getting them stoked, getting them excited,
etc.
o 	Who's going to bring the JV's (are you going to bring the JV's or is the person
you're working with going to bring them)?
o 	There's the nitty gritty management of links, passwords, JV questions, etc.
o 	The JV portion is really a second launch. The launch to get partners excited
and promote and not mail just once, but mail for each piece of Prelaunch,
then mail multiple times during open cart. It’s a big piece.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

BONUS – Launch Partnership
Those are the three primary pieces, and you have to be clear with
yourself, and also with your client, which of those three you're going
to bring. To recap…
¨ The PLM model where you get paid a percentage of the launch
¨ Absolutely great model if you get the right client
¨ And if you've got the authority to really drive them to create a great offer, to create a
great Prelaunch, and to bring it in on time
¨ And then once you do it once, you're going to have more people that want to work
with you
¨ It's a great way to get started
¨ It requires work
¨ It requires commitment
¨ Pick the great partner, the great person you're going to work with
¨ Then negotiate a great deal and stick to that great deal
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
